opportunities.description: eBay auto-sync: automated listing creation and inventory sync. Code written (tools/ebay_sync.py planned), blocked on eBay API credentials on Patch VPS. Eliminates 3-4hrs/week manual listing work.
opportunities.blocker: EBAY_APP_ID and EBAY_CERT_ID env vars needed on Patch

opportunities.description: Bulk pricing optimization: negotiate 5-8% better wholesale rates on Pokemon sealed product by committing to larger quarterly orders with primary distributor.
Inventory alerting: automated low-stock notifications via email/Hive when SKUs hit reorder points. Prevents stockouts that cost ~£150/month in lost sales.
Website SEO + content: add Pokemon set guides and buying guides to zerone-dev.com. Organic traffic currently minimal. Could drive 15-20% more direct sales (lower fees than eBay).
Singles grading pipeline: identify top-value pulls from sealed openings, grade via PSA/CGC. Graded cards sell at 3-5x raw price. Start with 10-card test batch.
Channel shift: move 10% of eBay volume to direct website sales. eBay fees 12.8% vs Stripe 2.9%. Net margin gain ~10% on shifted volume.
